category_sources: official homepage describes empty as a PTY utility for shell scripts interacting with telnet, ssh, ftp, and similar programs.
display_name_sources: official homepage heading uses the name empty.
docs_sources: official homepage is the best documentation surface found and includes installation, usage examples, and project description.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage and source_facts.source-archive point to SourceForge downloads but do not identify an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: official homepage says empty runs processes under PTY sessions and can replace TCL/Expect in shell scripts.
